angles.name: beatleslegend
angles.copy: Ringo Starr turns 86, a true Beatles legend and one of the most iconic drummers in music history, he turns 86 on July 7th, we celebrate his life and career on Nation 60s and Nation 70s

angles.name: queenguitarist
angles.copy: Brian May, the legendary Queen guitarist, turns 74 on July 19th, we celebrate his iconic riffs and hits on Nation 70s, Nation 80s and Nation Rocks

angles.name: rollingstonesicon
angles.copy: Mick Jagger, the iconic Rolling Stones frontman, turns 83 on July 26th, we celebrate his enduring legacy and hits on Nation 60s, Nation 70s and Nation Rocks

events.title: MTV Launched 47 years ago
events.blurb: MTV launched 47 years ago with Buggles - Video Killed The Radio Star as its first video

angles.name: mtvlaunch
angles.copy: On August 1st, 1981, MTV launched and changed the music landscape forever, its first video, Buggles - Video Killed The Radio Star, still resonates today, we look back on Nation 80s

events.title: Oasis release Definately Maybe 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album Definately Maybe 32 years ago

angles.name: oasisdebut
angles.copy: On August 5th, 1994, Oasis released their debut album Definately Maybe, a pivotal moment in Britpop history, we revisit their early days on Nation 90s and Nation Rocks

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago

angles.name: woodstock
angles.copy: The legendary Woodstock Festival took place on August 15th, 1969, a defining moment in music history, we look back at the performances and impact on Nation 60s

events.title: Anniversary Of Elvis' Death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away 49 years ago

angles.name: elvispresley
angles.copy: On August 16th, 1977, the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, we pay tribute to his enduring legacy and music on Nation 60s and Nation Easy

events.title: Tupac Shakur is shot dead in Las Vegas 30 years ago
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot dead in Las Vegas 30 years ago

angles.name: tupacshakur
angles.copy: On September 7th, 1996, Tupac Shakur was tragically taken from us, his music and message continue to inspire and influence generations, we remember him on Nation 90s

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix' Death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix passed away 57 years ago

angles.name: jimihendrix
angles.copy: On September 18th, 1970, the world lost a guitar legend, Jimi Hendrix, we pay tribute to his groundbreaking music and enduring influence on Nation 60s and Nation Rocks

events.title: The Beatles release Abbey Road 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album Abbey Road 57 years ago

angles.name: abbeyroad
angles.copy: On September 26th, 1969, The Beatles released one of the most influential albums in history, Abbey Road, we celebrate its enduring legacy and impact on music on Nation 60s

angles.name: chrissiehynde
angles.copy: The Pretenders' iconic frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, turns 75 on September 7th, we celebrate her distinctive voice and enduring music on Nation 80s

angles.name: liamgallagher
angles.copy: Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, turns 55 on September 21st, we revisit his iconic style and music on Nation 90s and Nation Rocks

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic album Imagine 51 years ago

angles.name: johnlennonimagine
angles.copy: On October 8th, 1971, John Lennon released his iconic album Imagine, a powerful and enduring statement of peace and humanity, we celebrate its legacy on Nation 70s

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago

angles.name: appleipod
angles.copy: On October 23rd, 2001, Apple released the first iPod, revolutionizing the way we listen to music, we look back at its impact on Nation Network

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: It's James Bond Day on October 5th

angles.name: jamesbond
angles.copy: On October 5th, we celebrate James Bond Day, marking the world premiere of the first Bond film, Dr No, in 1962, we look at the enduring appeal of the franchise on Nation Network

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon would have been 86 on October 9th

angles.name: johnlennon
angles.copy: John Lennon, the iconic Beatle and solo artist, would have been 86 on October 9th, we pay tribute to his enduring music and legacy on Nation 60s and Nation 70s
